lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer’s unit has the MARKERLIGHT keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is in your army, it must be your WARLORD.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 2+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of the your Command phase, if this unit within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a CRISIS FIREKNIFE BATTLESUIT unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and not within 9" of any enemy units.
Designer’s Note: Place a Homing Beacon token next to this unit, removing it once this ability is used.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

entries.name: Pathfinders w/ pulse carbine and grenade launcher

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Designer’s Note: Place an Oversight Drone token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.

entries.name: Vespid Stingwings w/ Neutron Grenade Launcher
Vespid Stingwings w/ Neutron Rail Rifle

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly KROOT INFANTRY units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT CHARACTER models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack with a ranged weapon that targets a unit that can FLY, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT, KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT, KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models. If this model is equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, it has a transport capacity of 22 T’AU INFANTRY models instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT, KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT, KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

entries.name: Kroot Farstalker w/ Farstalker firearm and Pech'ra

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a model in its Guided unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value:
This model has a transport capacity of all of the following:
- 200 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY or TACTICAL DRONE models
- 4 DEVILFISH, SKY RAY GUNSHIP or HAMMERHEAD models
- 8 BATTLESUIT models with a Wounds characteristic of 9 or less

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this TRANSPORT can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 48 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. This model can also transport up to 6 BATTLESUIT models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic, e.g. a BATTLESUIT with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8 models). This model cannot transport KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

entries.name: Heavy Gun Drone w/ Burst cannon and markerlight
Heavy Gun Drone w/ Twin burst cannon

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
Designer’s Note: Place two Blacklight Marker Drone tokens next to this model, removing one each time this ability has been used.

profiles.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

weapons.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell
➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
Designer’s Note: Place two Blacklight Marker Drone tokens next to this model, removing one each time this ability has been used.

profiles.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

weapons.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable Save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack (excluding attacks that target MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly KROOT unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model's unit, if this model's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly KROOT unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.value: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT, KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. It cannot transport BATTLESUIT, KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

entries.name: Kroot Farstalker w/ Farstalker firearm and Pech'ra

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a model in its Guided unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value:
This model has a transport capacity of all of the following:
- 200 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY or TACTICAL DRONE models
- 4 DEVILFISH, SKY RAY GUNSHIP or HAMMERHEAD models
- 8 BATTLESUIT models with a Wounds characteristic of 9 or less

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this TRANSPORT can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 48 T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY models. This model can also transport up to 6 BATTLESUIT models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic, e.g. a BATTLESUIT with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8 models). This model cannot transport KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

entries.name: Heavy Gun Drone w/ Burst cannon and markerlight
Heavy Gun Drone w/ Twin burst cannon

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
Designer’s Note: Place two Blacklight Marker Drone tokens next to this model, removing one each time this ability has been used.

profiles.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

weapons.name: ➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell
➤ Experimental pulse submunitions rifle - ionic cluster-beam shell

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable Save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack (excluding attacks that target MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly KROOT unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model's unit, if this model's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly KROOT unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.
